title: Memory file-source ACL inheritance
goal: Implement source ACL inheritance for file-backed memory sources with fail-closed unresolved ACL policy.
acceptance: Ingestion profile supports ACL modes including inherit_source_acl and conservative fallback options.
ACL resolver can collect or represent file ACL metadata for local/UNC sources through a replaceable adapter.
Known AD/user/group principals map to portal scope tokens.
Unknown or unreadable ACL creates visible memory issue and blocks normal publication by default.
Derived scope tokens are attached to source objects, snapshots, chunks and graph facts as needed.
Retrieval continues to double-filter by scope in backend and Django policy layer.
Tests cover allow, deny/unknown principal and ACL read failure paths.
